scheme_name: Parag Parikh Flexi Cap Fund - Regular Plan - Growth

FUND MANAGERS
1. Mr. Rajeev Thakkar - Chief Investment Officer - Equity and Director (Since Inception)
2. Mr. Raj Mehta - Executive Vice President & Fund Manager - Equity (Since September 1, 2025)
3. Mr. Raunak Onkar - Fund Manager Dedicated for Overseas Securities (Since Inception)

5. Ms. Mansi Kariya - Associate Vice President & Fund Manager- Debt (Since December 22, 2023)

AUM AND EXPENSE RATIO
- AUM: ₹1,33,372.11 Crores as on Jan 31, 2026
- Expense Ratio for Regular Plan: 1.28%

INVESTMENT OBJECTIVE
To seek to generate long-term capital growth from an actively managed portfolio primarily of Equity and Equity Related Securities. Scheme shall invest in Indian equities, foreign equities and related instruments and debt securities. However, there is no assurance that the investment objective of the Scheme will be achieved and the Scheme does not assure or guarantee any returns.

Not available.
